ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "thcic_id" INTEGER /* Texas Healthcare Information Collection (THCIC) ID */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "hospital_city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the hospital is located */,
  "total_discharges" INTEGER /* Total number of discharges for the year */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of the hospital (e.g., general, specialized, teaching) */,
  "hospital_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the hospital */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hospital's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hospital's location */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Year the hospital was established */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the hospital is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discharge_quarters" (
  "discharge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discharge record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the discharge data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "discharges" INTEGER /* Number of discharges for the quarter */,
  "admissions" INTEGER /* Number of admissions for the quarter */,
  "average_length_of_stay" REAL /* Average length of stay for discharged patients */,
  "readmissions" INTEGER /* Number of readmissions within a certain period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discharge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discharge_quarters_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital system */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the hospital system (e.g., public, private, non-profit) */,
  "total_hospitals" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitals in the system */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds across all hospitals in the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the system is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_system_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital system */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the hospital joined the system */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the hospital is the primary hospital in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_system_members_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES hospital_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_system_members_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hospital administrator, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discharge_data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the discharge data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_period" TEXT /* Period of the data (e.g., 2022, Q1 2023) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discharge_data_files_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discharge_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_processor" TEXT /* Name of the person or system that processed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discharge_metadata_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES discharge_data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the contact person */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact is the primary contact for the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_contacts_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)
